calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Plaintiff Birds Motion For Leave Of Court To Withdraw Admissions
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Gene Halavanau of Halavanau Law Office telephone number 415-692-5301 for Plaintiff.
Jim Hammer of Hammer Law telephone number 415-505-5040 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF CRAIG BIRD'S Motion For Leave Of Court To Withdraw Admissions is granted. Counsel for the Defendant is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
